title: BEM-867 route final approval
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/roadmap']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:43 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem866_verify_final_approval.json')
decision=prev.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
if decision=='APPROVED':
    marker=Path('governance/roadmap/BEM867_FINAL_PROTOCOL_APPROVED_RESUME.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-867 | Final Protocol Approved — Resume Roadmap'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+'Protocol: governance/protocols/BEM864_LATEST_CLAUDE_PATCHED_PROTOCOL.md'+sep)
    status='final_protocol_approved_resume_marker_created'
    next_action='resume roadmap implementation under final approved protocol'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
elif decision in ['CHANGE_REQUIRED','BLOCKED']:
    marker=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem867_final_approval_changes_required.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-867 | Final Approval Changes Required'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: extract concrete patchable changes from BEM-866 response.'+sep)
    status='final_approval_changes_required'
    next_action='extract concrete patchable changes from BEM-866 response'
    created_files=[str(marker)]
else:
    status='final_approval_missing_or_unknown'
    next_action='broaden final response filter and inspect all real Claude responses'
    created_files=[]
state={'bem':'BEM-867','status':status,'decision':decision,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem867_route_final_approval.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem867_route_final_approval.md').write_text('# BEM-867 | Route Final Approval | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem867_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-867'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem867_route_final_approval.json','governance/reports/bem867_route_final_approval.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem867_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-866 final approval decision')
"""
No issue comments.
